headline: UPS (UPS) Stock May Be 37% Undervalued Despite Cold Chain Expansion
summary: United Parcel Service stock has fallen about 36.2% over the past five years, yet the current valuation work suggests the market price may still sit well below an estimate of intrinsic value. This raises the question of whether investors are being paid for near term execution and cash flow risks. The roughly 36.2% decline over five years means long term holders in United Parcel Service have seen meaningful value erased. That can matter a lot when weighing whether the present price offers...
